description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8 Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define three stages: test, build, and deploy. In the test stage add a test:lint job that runs `yarn` then `yarn lint`, and a test:unit job that runs `yarn` then `yarn test`. In the build stage add a build job that runs `yarn` then `yarn build` and publishes the `dist` folder as an artifact that expires after one week. In the deploy stage add a deploy:prod job that depends on build, runs in the prod environment only on tags, and executes `yarn global add netlify-cli` followed by `netlify deploy -p dist -s $NETLIFY_PROD -t $NETLIFY_TOKEN`; also add a deploy:staging job that depends on build, runs in the staging environment manually, and runs the same commands but uses `$NETLIFY_STAGING` for the site ID.
